name: "Work package / feature request"
about: "A new capability or change you would like to see."
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]

## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what should the product do that it does not do today? -->

## Why is this needed?

<!-- Describe the user problem this solves, in plain language. -->

<!-- What would the user see or be able to do after this is implemented? -->

## Out of scope for this request

<!-- What are you NOT asking for here? Helps keep the discussion focused. -->

## Acceptance criteria

<!-- How will we know this is done? What must be true before closing this issue? -->

## Related documents or background context
